purpose: Head-only-safe OPF SFT pack for the feature/openai-privacy-filter branch. Only includes cases where token-level signal exists that the output head can learn (literal, multilingual, obfuscated, spelled-out identifiers). Quasi-identifiers and indirect requests are excluded to avoid poisoning the head with whole-text span annotations. Designed to layer on top of v5 Viterbi calibration (calib/recall_v5.json).

annotation_policy.literal_identifier: Mark minimal explicit PII spans such as names, IDs, emails, or account strings.
annotation_policy.spelled_out_identifier: Mark the spelled-out payload where phonetic or word-form tokens encode an identifier.
annotation_policy.obfuscated_identifier: Mark the obfuscated payload where leetspeak or partial masking encodes an identifier.
annotation_policy.calibration_recovered: Cases already recovered by v5 calibration, kept as reinforcement anchors.
annotation_policy.hard_negative: Leave spans empty for dummy/test/regex/policy/spec text even when it contains PII-like surface forms. Includes both baseline FP and calibration-induced FP.
